glue.classifier.grokclassifier.Classific.Docs: An identifier of the data format that the classifier matches, such as Twitter, JSON, Omniture logs, and so on.

glue.classifier.grokclassifier.CustomPat.Docs: Optional custom grok patterns defined by this classifier. For more information, see custom patterns in [Writing Custom Classifiers](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/glue/latest/dg/custom-classifier.html).

glue.classifier.grokclassifier.GrokPatte.Docs: The grok pattern applied to a data store by this classifier. For more information, see built-in patterns in [Writing Custom Classifiers](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/glue/latest/dg/custom-classifier.html).
